TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kalisahan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 51 buwan, 180 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 176 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 4 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 82%, Amis 4%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 1%, Thau 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 10%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kalisahan hya' ga Nakanu. tay mkyahu' na Kalisahan hya' ga Minami. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kalisahan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Kalisahan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kalis~ɕaħan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ɣenħeʔi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, pujuma *%, tħau *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli **%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na kalis~ɕaħan ħjaʔ ɣa nakanu. taj mkjaħuʔ na kalis~ɕaħan ħjaʔ ɣa minami. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ kalis~ɕaħan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ kalis~ɕaħan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Kalisahan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 51 buwan, 180 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 176 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 4 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 82%, Amis 4%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 1%, Thau 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 10%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kalisahan hya' ga Nakanu. tay mkyahu' na Kalisahan hya' ga Minami. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kalisahan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Kalisahan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kalis~ɕaħan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ɣenħeʔi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, pujuma *%, tħau *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli **%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na kalis~ɕaħan ħjaʔ ɣa nakanu. taj mkjaħuʔ na kalis~ɕaħan ħjaʔ ɣa minami. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ kalis~ɕaħan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ kalis~ɕaħan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
